verses.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਘਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਰਤੇ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥
verses.hindi: जै घरि कीरति आखीऐ करते का होइ बीचारो ॥
verses.english: In that house where the Praises of the Creator are chanted and contemplated
verses.translation: In the home where the Praise of the Creator is sung and contemplated

verses.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ਸਿਵਰਿਹੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
verses.hindi: तितु घरि गावहु सोहिला सिवरिहु सिरजणहारो ॥१॥
verses.english: Sing in that house the Song of Praise, and remember the Creator.
verses.translation: In that home, sing the Song of Praise and remember the Creator.

verses.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਾ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ॥
verses.hindi: तुम गावहु मेरे निरभउ का सोहिला ॥
verses.english: Sing the Song of Praise of my Fearless Lord.
verses.translation: Sing the song of praise of my Fearless Lord.
